description: A reblog of a post to the user's own feed, optionally with additional commentary and tags. Equivalent to a Tumblr reblog — the reblog appears in the reblogger's feed and carries the original post forward.

main.description: A reblog of a Backyard post with optional additions.

subject.description: The post or reblog being reblogged.

content.description: Optional additional content blocks (text, images, embeds) added by the reblogger.

tags.description: Tags added by the reblogger for categorization.
